title: limonium album
intro: Limonium album, also known as sea lavender or white sea lavender, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limonium album include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a natural dye due to its vibrant purple-blue color.
